---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ext237

---

## Feature type

What kind of feature are you requesting?

- Enhancement: changes the page behavior or DOM to help improve an accessibility issue
- Audit: reports possible WCAG/accessibility issues in the console without changing the page
- Both / not sure

## Feature request related problem

Describe the accessibility issue, Squarespace limitation, or WCAG review problem this request would help with.

## Related WCAG criteria

List any WCAG success criteria that may be related, if known.

Examples:

- 1.1.1 Non-text Content
- 1.3.1 Info and Relationships
- 2.1.1 Keyboard

## The solution

Describe what you want SqsA11y to do.

For enhancements, describe the DOM, ARIA, CSS, focus, keyboard, or behavior change you are requesting.

For audits, describe what should be checked and what kind of console message would be helpful.

## Alternative Attempts

JavaScript dom rewriting should be considered a last resort for WCAG conformance.  Describe any other approaches you considered, such as:

- Fixing it directly in the Squarespace editor, but the option isn't offered
- Adding custom CSS
- Adding custom JavaScript
- Updating content manually

## Squarespace context

Please include as much as you can:

- Squarespace version: 7.0 / 7.1
- Template or theme, if known:
- Page type affected: page / blog / product / form / gallery / index / other
- Is AJAX loading enabled? yes / no
- Is this issue on one page or site-wide?
- Website URL, if public:

## Example markup or page pattern

If possible, include a small HTML example, screenshot, or description of the Squarespace-generated pattern.

## Additional context

Add anything else that may help evaluate the request, including screenshots, screen recordings, accessibility test results, automated tool findings, or notes from manual testing.
